title: Light Thingy
description: Adds Custom Model Data Items to make cool light effects
body:
This pack adds a couple light decoration items. It was highly requested by people on my [reddit post](https://www.reddit.com/r/DetailCraft/comments/1dsiery/a_street_lantern/).

To get them I highly recommend using the Axiom mod because doing it would be way eaisier. Below i put all the Custom Model Data ID's of the **Yellow Stained Glass**
- 5001 - Lantern Deco
- 5002 - Lantern Light
- 5003 - Window Light

Below there is a list of the scales you would ideally keep your display entities in:
- Lantern deco - 1.125
- Lantern light - 4
- Window Light - 1
